---
name: Fix Content
about: Report a factual error, broken link, outdated information, or unclear explanation
title: "fix: [short description] in Section [XX]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What is the issue?

- [ ] Factual error — a claim is incorrect
- [ ] Outdated information — a claim was correct but is no longer
- [ ] Broken or redirected link
- [ ] Unclear explanation — a concept is confusing or poorly explained
- [ ] Incorrect code example
- [ ] Typo or grammar error

---

## Where is it?

**Section:**
<!-- e.g., Section 05 — When Microservices -->

**The current content:**
```
paste the relevant text, URL, or code here
```

---

## What should it be?

**Suggested correction:**
```
paste here
```

**Source supporting the correction (if applicable):**
<!-- A link or citation that supports your suggested change -->
